problem_raw: Our HR department is struggling with manual onboarding.
problem_refined: The HR department currently takes 14 days to onboard new employees using manual email and paper-based processes. 50 new hires per month require access to Email, Slack, and HRIS on day 1 but provisioning delays average 4 days. Goal: reduce onboarding to 2 days with zero access delays.

impacted_systems.name: Email
impacted_systems.reason: Email is used for onboarding communication and paperwork.
impacted_systems.evidence: Our company currently onboards new employees using email and paper forms.

impacted_systems.name: HRIS
impacted_systems.reason: HRIS is essential for managing employee records and onboarding processes.
impacted_systems.evidence: New hires require access to HRIS on day 1.

impacted_systems.name: Slack
impacted_systems.reason: Slack is used for communication among employees and teams.
impacted_systems.evidence: New hires require access to Slack on day 1.

impacted_stakeholders.name: HR Director
impacted_stakeholders.reason: Responsible for overseeing the onboarding process and improving efficiency.

impacted_stakeholders.name: IT Manager
impacted_stakeholders.reason: Responsible for automating access provisioning for new hires.

impacted_stakeholders.name: Finance
impacted_stakeholders.reason: Interested in accurate cost tracking per new hire.

impacted_stakeholders.name: New Employees
impacted_stakeholders.reason: Directly affected by the onboarding process and their access to systems.
